candidate_precision_summary.guardrail: Rejected candidates do not remove their source document. Accepted questions remain draft/advisor-review-required.

limitations: Representative candidate-stage regression used six real files from the supplied 104-file McFirecoal package. A full browser ZIP extraction run was attempted but timed out in the managed environment and is not claimed as a pass.
